## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.9

### 🔔 Notifications
- Adds clearer debug logging around camera event notification readiness, including whether the ready event contains the X-Sense Recordings panel link and cached media link.
- Keeps recording-link notifications gated on cached recording media so users are not sent a playback link before the clip is ready.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Tightens recording cache diagnostics for direct video downloads and SD playback capture, including content type, byte counts, MP4 validation, and cache timing.
- Adds browser-side playback diagnostics for response content type and blob type in the X-Sense Recordings panel.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Keeps imported X-Sense camera-event blueprints aligned with the bundled blueprint automatically during startup and periodic maintenance.

### ✅ Validation
- Validates the notification, recording cache, panel playback, stale blueprint, and XC0M-iR mapping paths with the full test suite.
